details.test: Task 1 - Schedule 60-min strategy consultation in March
Task 2 - Choose operations consulting package >=20 hours under $5000
Task 3 - Save three manufacturing case studies (100-500 employees)
Task 4 - Subscribe to weekly leadership newsletter with specific topics
Task 5 - Request proposal for 6-month healthcare digital transformation project
Task 6 - Save two 2023 customer experience articles to reading list
Task 7 - Configure 3-month remote process optimization estimate under $30k
Task 8 - Register for next-month Tuesday AI in business webinar (2-5 PM)
Task 9 - Compare two financial services testimonials with rating >=4
Task 10 - Build 3-service custom bundle (40-60 hours) and submit inquiry
